title: Avoid possessive quantifier regex patterns that always fail
description: Regex patterns that use a possessive quantifier followed by a pattern that cannot match will always fail. This can lead to unexpected behavior and bugs. Review and correct such patterns to ensure they work as intended.
recommendation: Refactor regex patterns to avoid using possessive quantifiers in ways that make the pattern always fail.

checks.message: Refactor regex patterns to avoid using possessive quantifiers in ways that make the pattern always fail.
